parameters: Hmm? Why are you looking for an inn here? This is where they
This place is fine for slaves, but I personally recommend the inn to
These are the gladiator apartments. They tend to run out of money
fast and end back here a lot.
Still, their expressions are a lot brighter than back when they were
slaves. Good for them, I guess?

Stay away from here. If you catch the eye of one of the angry ones,

Plana may have changed, but this place is as filthy as ever.
I'd stay away if I were you.

They spend their days killing each other surrounded by spectators
and their nights doing manual labor. It's hard work being a slave.
Up ahead you'll find the lower level of the coliseum. The gladiators
We're performing maintenance backstage right now. No entry.
I can cook and clean, but I don't know how to manage livestock.
I want to work somewhere with good wages!
This is my third time at market. People keep buying and
The rich buy slaves, run them into the ground, then get rid of
I'm never going to be sold as a slave again. I can hardly believe it.
Only within Plana, though. In other countries, slaves are treated
even worse. I dread to think about it.
I can cook and sew. As for my salary... I'd like to be paid well.
I used to be a carpenter, believe it or not. If you want a gladiator,
I was a carpenter before I became a slave. If you need more hands,
If you want a slave, speak to one of the merchants. You'll need to
sort out a contract along with some other stuff.
Now that the slave trade's been outlawed, the slave market's been
made into a hub for managing temporary employee placements.
Beautiful slaves are luxury items. If you want one for work,
judge them by their build and attitude.
Beautiful slaves are luxury items. If you want one for work,
judge them by their build and attitude.
You're going to take part in the Saint Coliseum, right? In that case,
I'll bet on you losing in the first round!
How about an excellent housekeeper? Ah, will that do?
Don't be like that. At least talk to...
Slavery may end up being completely abolished. Did I make the right
choice in switching careers so quickly?
You need to check slaves over carefully before buying them. You
don't want to take a male home only to find he's missing a dick.
That slave trader's so full of himself. Still, he's the only one we can
buy from, so complaining won't get us anywhere.
That slave trader's going broke! After all the trouble he's given
me, it serves him right! Hah!
Child slaves last much longer, but the downside's that they're not
I wanted to buy myself a child slave, but I think I'll consider
The slave in charge of looking after my house got sent to the Slave
Internment Camp. I need a cheap one to take over their work.
I need a slave who's good at housework. I can earn money just
fine, but I'm useless around the house.
I'm single, so I'm looking for a slave to handle all the housekeeping.
I think I'll get a male one.
Looks like you can't buy slaves anymore. I'm fine with hiring.
I don't really care as long as the work gets done.
Are you here to buy a slave? They're more expensive than you'd
expect, so be sure to pick carefully.
I never thought of hiring myself a housekeeper. Pretty much
everything was handled by slaves before.
Thinking about how much it costs to keep a slave, though...
It's probably cheaper to just hire someone.
There's a warm, glowing light. Fully restore the party?
The party's HP and MP has been fully restored!
